channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Federal judge blocks Trump's mail-in voting order
item.description: A federal judge on Thursday blocked key parts of the Trump administration's executive order that sought to create a citizenship list for eligible voters.

item.title: UN halts Hormuz sailor evacuations after reported attack in strait
item.description: The UN stopped efforts to evacuate over 11,000 sailors stranded in the Strait of Hormuz after Iran objected and a cargo ship was reportedly attacked.

item.title: China's new open-source model raises AI hacking concerns
item.description: GLM-5.2, the latest Chinese open-source model gaining attention in Silicon Valley, is raising new worries among security researchers about advanced AI hacking threats.

item.title: Supreme Court blocks lawsuits over chemical risk warnings
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled Thursday that consumers cannot use state courts to sue manufacturers for failing to warn about hazards related to certain chemicals.
